Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore, including `js_tooling.js` and `node_modules`.

# Purpose
The `js_tooling.js` file and `node_modules` directory are part of a JavaScript project setup. The `js_tooling.js` file typically contains configuration or scripts related to JavaScript tooling, such as build processes, task runners, or other development utilities. The `node_modules` directory contains all the installed Node.js packages and their dependencies required for the project to function correctly.
